goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: OpenAPI YAML syntax only: quote the comma-containing GET 200 description scalar, preserving every word and contract element. Then run all remaining final gates; retain T092 cooking E2E pass if hashes remain exact.

worker_package.objective: Quote one OpenAPI scalar only, then complete final OpenAPI/full/build/protected/database/integrity gates.
verify: Require OpenAPI/cooking/CSS/TSX hashes from T093 and one-line quote-only diff.
Run scoped format/OpenAPI/full lint/type/unit/integration, isolated full-source build.
Run three unchanged protected E2Es and disposable DB; retain exact-hash T092 cooking pass or rerun if needed.
stop_if: Hashes differ or diff beyond quotes.
Another OpenAPI error or any source/test/config change needed.

evidence: YAML flow commas require one quoted scalar.

parallel_safety.rationale: Parse repair precedes serial final gates.
